metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

ECON-H001.title: Delegation Checkpoint Wipe-Out via Single Token Transfer
ECON-H001.duplicate_group_description: VotingDelegationLib.moveTokenDelegates uses incorrect filter `ownerOfFn(tId) == srcRep` instead of `tId != _tokenId`, wiping all delegated tokens from a delegate's checkpoint on any token transfer/mint/burn

OPS-H001.title: AVM-Delegated veNFT Bribe Rewards Permanently Locked in AutoVotingEscrow Contracts
OPS-H001.duplicate_group_description: AVM-managed veNFT bribe rewards permanently locked due to ownerOf returning AutoVotingEscrow instance (not manager), failed `_owner == avm` comparison, and no-op setOriginalOwner

OPS-H005.title: RewardsDistributor claim_many Missing AVM Owner Resolution Causes Rebase Loss
OPS-H005.duplicate_group_description: RewardsDistributor.claim_many lacks AVM owner resolution logic present in claim(), sending expired AVM lock rewards to AutoVotingEscrow contract

OPS-H002.title: Bribe Reward Claims Permanently DoS'd by Unbounded earned() Loop with WEEK=1800
OPS-H002.duplicate_group_description: Bribe.earned() unbounded epoch loop with WEEK=1800 causes permanent gas DoS after days of unclaimed rewards

TECH-H013.title: Gas-bounded checkpoint logic may permanently desync voting power after ~5.3 days inactivity (WEEK=1800), breaking totalSupply/vote accounting
TECH-H013.duplicate_group_description: VotingEscrow._checkpoint 255-iteration loop covers only 5.3 days with WEEK=1800, permanently corrupting global voting power after inactivity

TECH-H004.title: PermissionsRegistry.removeRole Corrupts _addressToRoles Using Wrong Source Array for Swap-and-Pop
TECH-H004.duplicate_group_description: PermissionsRegistry.removeRole corrupts _addressToRoles by using global _roles array instead of per-user array in swap-and-pop

ECON-H005.title: delegateBySig Replay Attack Due to Nonce Not Incremented by Direct delegate()
ECON-H005.duplicate_group_description: delegateBySig signature replay after direct delegate() call because delegate() does not increment nonces

TECH-H008.title: SMNFT_BONUS Change Breaks totalSupply vs Individual Balance Invariant
TECH-H008.duplicate_group_description: setSmNFTBonus changes bonus rate globally but individual smNFT checkpoints retain old values, breaking totalSupply == sum(balanceOfNFT) invariant

TECH-H009.title: VoterV3 voted Flag Stuck True When All Voted Gauges Are Killed, Blocking Token Transfers
TECH-H009.duplicate_group_description: VoterV3 voted flag remains true when all gauges are killed because _vote only calls voting() when _usedWeight > 0

TECH-H010.title: AutoVotingEscrow.lockOwner Returns Incorrect Owner for Non-Existent or Released Token IDs
TECH-H010.duplicate_group_description: AutoVotingEscrow.lockOwner returns incorrect owner for non-existent/released tokenIds due to default mapping value of 0

OPS-H003.title: VotingEscrow Insolvency via Supply Desync from smNFT Token Burns
OPS-H003.duplicate_group_description: Merging normal lock into SMNFT burns tokens via _black.burn() without decrementing supply variable, causing VotingEscrow insolvency

ECON-H006.title: Expired Lock Merge into SMNFT Grants Free Bonus Voting Power
ECON-H006.duplicate_group_description: VotingEscrow.merge does not check source lock is active, allowing expired locks to merge into SMNFT for free bonus voting power

OPS-H007.title: RewardsDistributor Permanent Token Loss from checkpoint_token 20-Iteration Cap with WEEK=1800
OPS-H007.duplicate_group_description: RewardsDistributor._checkpoint_token 20-iteration loop covers only 10 hours with WEEK=1800, permanently losing undistributed rebase tokens

ECON2-H008.title: Bribe `withdraw` Silently Fails Allowing Phantom Votes
ECON2-H008.duplicate_group_description: Bribe.withdraw silently skips when amount > balanceOf[tokenId], creating phantom voting weight in bribe contracts

ECON-H023.title: Bribes Fee-on-Transfer Insolvency
ECON-H023.duplicate_group_description: Bribe.notifyRewardAmount records full reward amount without balance-delta check, creating insolvency with fee-on-transfer tokens

OPS-H006.title: Last-Hour Voting Restriction Bypass via deposit_for Triggering Poke for Any Voted Token
OPS-H006.duplicate_group_description: VoterV3.poke() lacks epochVoteEnd restriction present in vote(), allowing last-hour vote weight manipulation via deposit_for/increase_amount triggering poke

ECON-H011.title: SMNFT Split Does Not Update smNFTBalance Causing Global Accounting Divergence
ECON-H011.duplicate_group_description: SMNFT split does not adjust smNFTBalance, creating accounting divergence when combined with SMNFT_BONUS changes

TECH2-H009.title: TokenHandler blacklist emits no Blacklisted event due to early return, breaking monitoring and allowing stealth delisting
TECH2-H009.duplicate_group_description: TokenHandler._blacklist returns early before emitting Blacklisted event, breaking event-based monitoring

TECH2-H006.title: Bribe reward token set can be spammed with many connector tokens causing getReward to exceed gas limits and brick reward claiming
TECH2-H006.duplicate_group_description: create_lock allows any user to set isSMNFT=true without access control, enabling unrestricted permanent voting power creation

OPS-H017.title: Division-by-zero DoS in VoterV3 `_vote` when all selected gauges are dead (kills voting/reset workflows)
OPS-H017.duplicate_group_description: VoterV3._vote division-by-zero when _totalVoteWeight=0 because all selected gauges are dead, potentially due to inconsistent liveness checks between two loops

TECH-H015.title: PermissionsRegistry.removeRole may corrupt address role lists, breaking downstream authorization tooling and role revocation workflows
